title: Big Fan of It
description: Adds a functional fan based on real-life fan!
body:
# A big fan of it
Adds a fan!

![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)

## how to use fan

|  Clicks | Not Sneaking | Sneaking |
| ----------- | ----------- | ----------- |
| Left | Destroys it       | Picks it Up       |
| Right | Scroll Through Fan Levels        | Toggle Swinging        |
| Middle |                     Picks Fan       |  Picks Fan       |


![](https://laws.should-be.legal/3C14mzt.png)
